講到好應

Did you ever hear the tragedy of Darth HKer The Pig? I thought not. It's not a story the Chinese will tell you. It's a Labour legend. Darth HKer was a Dark Lord of the Labour, so hardwoking and so obedient he could use his life to influence the society to create prosperity… He had such a knowledge of the working side, he could even keep the ones he cared about from poverty. The diligent side of the life is a pathway to many abilities some consider to be unnatural.He became so wealthy… the only thing he was afraid of was losing his fortune, which eventually, of course, he did. Unfortunately, he gave his "同胞" everything he had, then his "同胞" killed him in his city. Ironic. He could save others from homeless, but not himself.
